title: Why Community Organizations Need Better Data Practices
excerpt: Most nonprofits collect data because funders ask for it — not because it helps the people they serve. That asymmetry has real consequences.

title: The Case for Federated Infrastructure in Muslim Social Services
excerpt: What would it look like if Muslim service organizations in Canada shared infrastructure without sacrificing independence? A look at the model we've been building.

title: Funding in the Dark: What Grantmakers Don't See
excerpt: Grant applications ask for outcomes data, but the systems that would generate that data are often underfunded. Here's what that cycle costs communities.
